title: SDA Issues Special Notice Seeking Iron Dome for America Architecture Studies
text:
Posted On: February 10, 2025
Responses Due: February 28, 2025
The Space Development Agency (SDA) is seeking executive summaries to prepare for 60-day studies on an “Iron Dome for America” architecture and capability. SDA is interested in industry’s perspective on implementing the Iron Dome for America architecture, with particular focus on enhancing the Proliferated Warfighter Space Architecture’s (PWSA) current contributions to global kill chains and missile defense.
This call for executive summaries falls under SDA Systems, Technologies, and Emerging Capabilities (STEC) Broad Agency Announcement (BAA), Focus Area #3; Advanced Target Custody, Warning, Tracking, and Defeat.
